object_a.label: rug
object_a.long_form_open_description: Neutral-toned low-pile carpet covering the floor area in front of the door and stairs. Carpet color is a mottled tan/beige that matches the warm tones of the wall paint; extends to the baseboard and door threshold.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: covers entire visible floor area, meeting the baseboard under the wall and sliding door threshold
